title: Fruity Expansion
description:
Fruity Expansion is a mod in development that introduces a new fruit-based farming dynamic to Minecraft. Currently available content:

🥭 Mango

🌺 Dragon Fruit (Pitaya)

⚙️ Blender (Juicer)
body:
Fruity Expansion is a mod in development that introduces a new fruit-based farming dynamic to Minecraft. Currently available content:

🥭 Mango: A tropical fruit that can be grown, consumed, and has in-game effects.

🌺 Dragon Fruit (Pitaya): Grows on a special cactus and provides unique properties.

⚙️ Blender (Juicer): Functional block for processing fruit into juice.

Coming soon: Other fruits (kiwi, coconut, strawberry, etc.) Various fruit trees with growth mechanics Recipes for smoothies, jams, and fruit salads An exclusive tropical biome Decorative blocks and new effects
